emails.subject: Tug Fork Development
emails.body: Tug Fork Development Morning Debra, Another Tug Fork deal was done 12/05/00, details as follows: March, 2001 10,000 MMBtu per month Price of 7.17 ENA Buyer Del.Pt: Columbia Gas Transmission Corp. Appalacia Deal Q88741.4/266512 Please let me know if you need more information. Thanks Ellen

emails.subject: Re: Tug Fork Development
emails.body: Re: Tug Fork Development Do you have deal #'s for any of the following? JayBee Oil term 12/1/00 --11/30/01 5000MMBtu 12/1/00 11/30/02 45000MM Kaplan Interests term 12/1/00 11/30/00 3300 MMBtu Blauser Well Services term 12/1/00 10/31/01 1250 MMBtu Cedar Resources term 12/1/01 1500 MMBtu 12/1/00 11/30/02 1000 MMBtu These are all App. producer transactions. Thanks Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490
